Sandbox_RVM_RequireAdminToAssociate_tool: When enabled, only admins and moderators can associate RV interior rooms with vehicles. Regular players cannot enter an RV that has no room assigned — ask an admin to associate a room first.
Sandbox_RVM_IdleCleanupDays_tooltip: Automatically dissociates rooms that have had no interaction for this many days. The last entry date is used; if never entered, the link date is used instead. Set to 0 to disable (default).
